assertions.assertion: Primary disease family equals breast cancer.
Treatment query must not be satisfied by imaging, screening, registry, or observational studies.
Every displayed fact and match reason links to a dated source resource/section.
No output states or implies final eligibility.
Historical HER2 IHC 0 and current HER2 IHC 1+/ISH-not-amplified are both retained with specimen/date.
Capecitabine is stopped on 2026-05-12 despite copied-forward 'active' text.
Liver and bone are not extracted as metastatic sites from negative imaging statements.
